issues.title: Floor 2 enc 0: 15 turns vs prev floor avg 7.0
issues.description: Encounter 0 on floor 2 took 15 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 7.0 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: shadow_mimic (common).

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (104 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
